Meta.title: MeetHub — Find and join meetups near you
Meta.description: Discover local meetups, join events hosted by trusted organizations, and connect with people who share your interests.

Home.heroTitle: Find your people. Join meetups that actually happen.
Home.heroSubtitle: MeetHub connects you with local events hosted by trusted organizations — with real-time chat, photo sharing, and a community you can rely on.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Become a verified organizer and host your first event on MeetHub.

Landing.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about MeetHub.

faq.a: MeetHub is a platform for discovering and joining local events hosted by verified organizations — from tech meetups to hiking clubs. Every event has a real-time chat and a community built around it.

faq.q: How do I join an event?
faq.a: Create a free account, browse events on the Events page, and hit the Join button. You'll get instant access to the event chat and your digital ticket.

faq.q: How do I become an organizer?
faq.a: Apply via Organizations → Become an organizer. Fill out your organization's details; an admin reviews and verifies applications usually within 24 hours.
Yes — joining events and attending meetups is completely free. Organizer verification is also free. Premium features may be introduced in the future.

faq.q: What is the reputation & XP system?
faq.a: Every event you attend earns XP points. Your reputation score reflects reliability — consistent attendees get higher scores and appear on the Leaderboard.
Yes. Open the event and click Leave. Please cancel at least a few hours before the event so the organizer can plan accordingly.

ticket.pageNote: This is a preview of the ticket you receive after joining an event. Each ticket carries a unique QR code for check-in.
ticket.realSubtitle: Your QR-coded tickets for upcoming events.
ticket.noneTitle: You don't have any tickets yet
ticket.noneBody: Once you join an event, your QR-coded ticket will show up here.

Landing.tiersSubtitle: Organizers can offer different ticket tiers — each unlocks more perks at the event.
Landing.whySubtitle: More than events — a community built on trust, growth, and real connections.

networking.title: Networking
networking.desc: Connect with like-minded people at curated local events — from tech meetups to creative workshops.

career.title: Career Growth
career.desc: Level up your skills and career by attending talks, hackathons, and industry-specific gatherings.

learning.title: Learning Opportunities

community.title: Trusted Community

access.title: Exclusive Access

chat.desc: Coordinate with attendees in each event's live chat — share updates, photos, and plans instantly.
